Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select

MD5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM),

md5(OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT_BK+VALID_FROM)

from

 

(SELECT DISTINCT GUID ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT_BK FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT

 

GUID,

 

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT_BK

 

FROM (

 

SELECT

 

GUID,

 

REPLACE(OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT, '\n', ',') AS OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT_REPLACED

 

FROM (

 

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

 

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

 

 

WHERE OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT IS NOT NULL

 

)

 

) AS BASE,

 

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT_REPLACED, ',') AS SPLIT

 

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

 

ORDER BY GUID, OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT_BK

)

)


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERS


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSH primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT set comment = 'Table having list of OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT Keys of physical asset ';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'Dimension Key';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_DATA_ARCHITECT.DIM_OWNERSHIP_METADATA_KEY is
'dimensional Key adding unique identifier';
